title: UserAchievement
description: Game Achievement Common Spec v1.0.0 — User achievement record

record_uid.description: Globally unique ID of this user_achievement record. Format: <site_namespace>:uach:<local_id>. local_id may contain ':' for hierarchical IDs, matching achievement.uid.

achievement_snapshot.description: Snapshot of the target Achievement at the time of recording. Enables import sites to display title/thumbnail without needing the original Achievement record. Includes i18n maps so cross-language display works without fetching the source Achievement.

title.description: Title in the snapshot's primary language.

title_i18n.description: Optional translations of `title`. Keys are BCP 47 language tags.

description_i18n.description: Optional translations of `description`. Keys are BCP 47 language tags.

thumbnail.description: data_uri only. Identity is verified by sha256 of binary content, not by preset_id.

item_refs.description: Game references. title + platform required. Other fields optional.

local_id.description: Origin site internal item ID (optional, should be stripped on cross-site import)

title_i18n.description: Optional translations of the game title. Keys are BCP 47 tags.

platform.description: Platform identifier. Same constraints as achievement.schema.json item_refs.platform.

maker_i18n.description: Optional translations of the maker name. Keys are BCP 47 tags.

external_ids.description: Recommended keys: igdb_id, mobygames_id, wikidata_id, ra_game_id, steam_appid, xbox_title_id, psn_np_communication_id. Additional keys are allowed for future / vendor-specific IDs.

created_at.description: Server-side record creation timestamp (when DB INSERT happened)

comment.description: Free-form user comment in the language indicated by `comment_lang`.

comment_lang.description: BCP 47 language tag for `comment`. Optional but recommended for cross-site display (e.g. <span lang="...">).

proof_url.description: Proof video/image URL. Implementations should whitelist hosts.
